headline: Autodesk (NASDAQ:ADSK): A Prime Candidate for the Affordable Growth Strategy
summary: Autodesk (ADSK) fits the affordable growth profile with strong EPS growth of 23%, a reasonable P/E of 22.52, and top-tier profitability. A solid choice for sustainable compounding without overpaying.
